# Iterate Intelligence Scaffolding Reference

## Context Loading

- Run objective search before complex execution.
- Retrieve memory for patterns, prior solutions, and repo conventions.
- Check nearby usages or architectural seams before changing shared components.

## Factuality Rules

- Verify symbols, APIs, and configuration names before using them.
- Prefer code or tool evidence over assumptions.
- Challenge any completion claim that is not backed by validation.

## Pattern Triggers

- The canonical Copirate vernacular dictionary lives in `.github/instructions/copirate-vernacular-dictionary.instructions.md`.
- Keep the shared `!patterns`, `!patternizer`, and `!topic` base meanings from that dictionary when running this workflow.
- Treat direct-user and whisper delivery the same way.
